label: Launch
description: Mission leaves the staging rail and enters the live route.

label: Obstacle lock
description: A forklift drifts into the path and triggers a controlled slowdown.

label: Assist request
description: Remote operator assistance is requested for a precise passing decision.

label: Manual handoff
description: Manual steering takes over briefly to complete a tight alignment turn.

label: Traction slip
description: Surface slip compensation appears on the route and the cloud stays visible for context.

label: Checkpoint
description: The route settles into a final checkpoint with the system ready for the next dispatch.
